title: Crimes Against the JVM
description:
Execute arbitrary bytecode (client-only!) from books you wrote. Because funny.
Now compatible with Sinytra Connector & Forgified Fabric API!
body:
# THIS IS CLIENT ONLY

Execute arbitrary JVM bytecode from books you wrote (Has to be your PlayerEntity as the author for security reasons) - just hold it in your offhand and press the key (Unbound by default, also for security reasons.)

Will not run on servers, for hopefully obvious reasons.
